issue.author: danilaml
issue.body:
After https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/commit/4010a7a5d0ea21374f3dcab85aa26a9804e1c35d

`opt -instcombine` on the following test IR:

```llvm
define i8 @test_switch_bad(i8 %cond) {
entry:
  switch i8 %cond, label %merge [
  i8 1, label %sw.1
  i8 7, label %sw.7
  i8 19, label %merge
  ]
sw.1:
  br label %merge
sw.7:
  br label %merge
merge:
  %ret = phi i8 [ 1, %sw.1 ], [ 7, %sw.7 ], [ 19, %entry ], [ 19, %entry ]
  ret i8 %ret
}
```
incorrectly replaces `%ret` with `%cond` even though in case we got into `merge` from "default" case, it should've been `19`, not any value `%cond` happens to have.
Godbolt: https://godbolt.org/z/eGY498q9e
issue.title: [InstCombine] Incorrect constant folding for certain switch cases

tests.test_body:
define i8 @test_switch_default_edge_duplicate(i8 %cond) {
entry:
  switch i8 %cond, label %sw.19 [
    i8 1, label %sw.1
    i8 7, label %sw.7
    i8 19, label %sw.19
  ]

sw.1:                                             ; preds = %entry
  br label %merge

sw.7:                                             ; preds = %entry
  br label %merge

sw.19:                                            ; preds = %entry, %entry
  br label %merge

merge:                                            ; preds = %sw.19, %sw.7, %sw.1
  %ret = phi i8 [ 1, %sw.1 ], [ 7, %sw.7 ], [ 19, %sw.19 ]
  ret i8 %ret
}

define i8 @test_switch_default_edge_direct(i8 %cond) {
entry:
  switch i8 %cond, label %merge [
    i8 1, label %sw.1
    i8 7, label %sw.7
    i8 19, label %merge
  ]

sw.1:                                             ; preds = %entry
  br label %merge

sw.7:                                             ; preds = %entry
  br label %merge

merge:                                            ; preds = %sw.7, %sw.1, %entry, %entry
  %ret = phi i8 [ 1, %sw.1 ], [ 7, %sw.7 ], [ 19, %entry ], [ 19, %entry ]
  ret i8 %ret
}
